subject: Development Cards : University, Palace, Market, Chapel, Library

posts.body:
I haven't played Catan for a while, but I'm now reviewing it for English teaching purposes. 

I find I have several Development Cards that I don't remember, each wotrth 1 VP :  University, Palace, Market, Chapel, Library .

They have the " Shield " / " circle" (?) reverse side. 

I wonder, do they belong to an expansion ?

No, they are part of the base game and belong with the other development cards. 
In the rules it should specify that you can play one of them immediately after purchase when it gives you your 10th VP. That's unlike the other development cards which you can only play at your next turn at the earliest.

This statement of the rule is poorly written. In CATAN (base version) the player does not PLAY these Victory Point cards during the game! This set of development cards are kept hidden by all players during the game. If a player during his turn attains the goal of 10 VP or more (variations may have a different goal number) the active player declares that he has won and then shows/displays all the Victory Point cards in his hand to prove he has the required number of points to win. The unique rule of these cards differs from other development cards in that the active player shows these cards immediately upon reaching or surpassing the VP goal even the Development Victory Point card that was purchased during this turn (that is do not wait a turn.) These Victory Cards are Revealed (displayed/shown) to claim victory; these cards are NOT played!
